content.en:
"Be careful, Rogo, the Void Child of the Nether Temple, is here!"

The third-rank invincible of the Heavenly Wind Sea said nervously.

Although Ye Tian's strength is comparable to that of the Son of the Void, after all, he is not the real Son of the Void, and no one knows how powerful the Son of the Void is, what if Ye Tian is not an opponent?

Maybe Luo Ge alone can't stop them so many invincible people, but Luo Ge will not fight them with his own strength, but with him as the leader, he will lead many third-class invincible people in the Netherworld Temple to defeat them, if no one can stop Luo Ge, their confidence will be destroyed, or even rout, then it is really easy to defeat.

Unless Tianfeng Hai pays a big price and sacrifices many heavy treasures to hit Luo Ge hard.

Luo Ge came too fast, and killed many third-class invincible people, wanting to tear apart the encirclement of the Golden Harvest branch by the Heavenly Wind Sea.

More than a dozen third-class invincible people in Tianfeng Sea collided with Luo Ge for the first time, but they were all knocked away by Luo Ge with one blow, showing almost invincible combat power.

"He, I'll deal with it!"

Ye Tian stopped Luo Ge and spoke.

The other invincibles nodded, they really couldn't stop Rogo, unless there were too many invincibles, but in that case, how could they resist the other third-class invincibles of the Netherworld.

If at this time, the invincible people of the Netherworld Hall of the Jinhe Branch rushed out and attacked them inside and outside, maybe Tianfeng Hai would suffer heavy losses this time.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian and Luo Ge fought.

As soon as he fought, Ye Tian found himself slightly at a disadvantage.

After all, there are not many people who have only become a third-class invincible, but Luo Ge is already extremely close to a second-class invincible, and Luo Ge's invincible body is also extremely powerful, not even weaker than Ye Tian's current physical body.

In addition, Luo Ge's combat skills are extremely proficient, as if after endless years of fighting, he has turned all the invincible skills into combat instincts, and the shot is a set of invincible skills, and all kinds of invincible skills are connected to the incomparably circular, as if the invincible skills have been turned into basic attacks.

And Ye Tian has not yet mastered such a method.

After all, he really doesn't have many opportunities to fight, and his cultivation speed is too fast, and he usually cultivates silently, where there are many fighting opportunities.

He didn't know how Rogo's combat ability was trained, but he also let him know that there are people outside the world, and there are heavens outside the sky, and Rogo is indeed very powerful.

And Luo Ge was also surprised, he also had to admit that Ye Tian's strength had reached the threshold of the Son of the Void, if he went to the assessment of the Son of the Void, there was nearly half of the chance of being able to pass the Son of the Void, if he was cultivating for a period of time, he was definitely not weaker than him.

He can only suppress Ye Tian in the rhythm of battle now, but it is difficult to kill Ye Tian.

Ye Tian found that if he continued to fight, he would not be able to destroy the Jinhe branch of the Netherworld Temple, so he proposed to retreat for the time being.

When the other third-class invincibles heard this, they immediately followed Ye Tian's advice and withdrew one by one.

Subsequently.

Many of the invincible people of Tianfeng Sea returned to a temporary base established by Tianfeng Sea in Jinhe Heaven and Earth to take a temporary rest.

......

Rogo entered the Golden Harvest Branch, and one after another invincible people came to meet the Son of the Void.

When Luo Ge listened to the loss report of the Jinhe branch, his face suddenly became a little ugly.

"A bunch of waste, so many invincibles have fallen!"

Rogo scolded angrily.

The other side.

When Ye Tian entered the base, he asked the other third-rank invincible people about the Children of the Void.

"Guys, what are the children of the void?"

Ye Tian asked sincerely.

A third-rank invincible person explained: "Lord Ye Tian, the Son of the Void is a title, and at the same time it is a kind of glory, basically every Eternal Name-level force or a few Saint-Name-level forces have Void Sons, our Heavenly Wind Sea has a total of five Void Sons, and the Netherworld Temple has a total of six Void Sons. As for how to obtain the title of Void Child, we don't know very well, only that once the Void Child is born, all forces will recognize it. "

After Ye Tian listened, he became even more curious about the Void Child.

------------------

In the following years, Tianfeng Sea used Jinhe Heaven and Earth as the battlefield and fought with the Netherworld Temple again and again, and Ye Tian and Luo Ge, the son of the Void, also fought many times, all of them were at a disadvantage, but they could barely compete with Luo Ge.

As the years passed, an invincible person fell, whether it was the Heavenly Wind Sea or the Netherworld Temple, the losses were relatively large.

However, such losses are still within the range of the two sides, after all, there is no loss of core combat strength, and no matter how many losses there are, the fourth- and fifth-class invincibles or the third-class invincibles will not be able to shake the fundamental problem.

On this day, however, the Nether Temple was furious.

The Heavenly Lin Realm, the headquarters of the Netherworld.

The Netherworld Hall Lord roared into the sky, stepped over, and directly found the Heavenly Wind Sea.

And the Heavenly Wind Supreme knew that the Netherworld Hall was coming, and directly fought with the Netherworld Hall Lord in the void of the Tianlin Realm.

"Heavenly Wind Source God, you are shameless, you actually killed a son of the void in my Netherworld Temple, thirteen first-class invincible people!!"

Origin Ancestor is a title for the Supreme One, which means that even if you are in the Source Sea, you can be called a god.

The Nether Hall Lord was extremely angry at this moment, almost losing his mind.

Thirteen first-class invincible beings, as well as a son of the void, all fell at once, which simply shook the foundation of the Netherworld!

He originally thought that the purpose of Tianfeng Sea was to kill those third-class invincibles and the invincibles under the third-class invincibles, but it was just a small fight, and he would not really start a battle of killing forces at the Yongming level.

Even if in the Outer Void, the Nether Temple loses some, it doesn't matter.

But he never expected that the real purpose of Tianfeng Sea was to be a first-class invincible person and a first-class invincible level Void Child.

It was an important branch of the Netherworld, somewhere in the Source Sea.

And the Heavenly Wind Source God condensed a temporary incarnation with special treasures, disguised as his own body, making him think that the main body of the Heavenly Wind Source God was in the Tianlin Realm.

However, at the critical moment of the Heavenly Wind Source God, the main body appeared in the branch of the Netherworld Temple, and at an extremely fast speed, he reddened thirteen first-class invincible people, as well as a son of the void, and then quickly returned to the Tianlin Realm.

He didn't know how the branch was exposed, but it was useless to probe how it was exposed.

He only wanted to fight to the death with the Heavenly Wind Source God now, otherwise he couldn't bear this breath.

The Heavenly Wind Source God sneered, "Netherworld Hall Lord, didn't you also attack and kill a first-class invincible person in our Heavenly Wind Sea before, I just followed your example." "

"You're revenge!"

The Nether Lord was furious.

The Heavenly Wind Source God admitted: "That's right, I'm just revenge, what's the matter?"

The silence between the two was too great, as if the entire Tianlin Realm was shaken.

At this moment, a man in white appeared in the void where they were fighting.

Seeing this person, the Heavenly Wind Source God and the Netherworld Hall Lord immediately stopped.

"I've seen Akiba Genzu!"
